moat_analysis.details: Good ROIC: >15% in 7/10 periods; Insufficient gross margin data; High capital requirements: Avg capex 22.4% of revenue; Invests in R&D, building intellectual property; Significant goodwill/intangible assets, suggesting brand value or IP

management_analysis.details: Good cash conversion: FCF/NI ratio of 0.95; Missing debt or equity data; Acceptable cash position: Cash/Revenue ratio of 0.06; No insider trading data available; Insufficient share count data

predictability_analysis.details: Moderately predictable revenue: 4.1% avg growth with some volatility; Highly predictable operations: Operating income positive in all periods; Moderately predictable margins: 34.5% avg with some volatility; Highly predictable cash generation: Positive FCF in all periods

valuation_analysis.details: Expensive: Only 2.9% FCF yield; Expensive: 56.9% premium to reasonable value; Growing FCF trend adds to intrinsic value
